_instructions.purpose: Copy this file to local-config.json and edit it for the target machine.
_instructions.do_not_commit: Do not commit local-config.json. It is machine-specific.
must_update: obsidian.vault_path unless your workflow always passes a vault path at runtime
routes.article.command if you wire a custom extractor instead of the built-in web article route
clipper.default_folder if your vault does not use Clippings
routes.social.auth.storage_state_path and routes.social.auth.cookies_file if you want Douyin/Xiaohongshu login-state reuse
notes: article uses the built-in web article route inside run_clipper.ps1 by default
social uses python + scripts/capture_social_playwright.py and download_social_media.ps1 by default
podcast uses the built-in web metadata route inside run_clipper.ps1 and does not require a separate command
